title: Steel Engraving
description: Ce style reproduit la précision méticuleuse des gravures sur acier et des illustrations scientifiques du XIXe siècle. Il repose entièrement sur des hachures et hachures croisées monochromes à lignes fines pour construire le volume, la texture et l'ombre, totalement dépourvu de dégradés lisses. Les traits d'encre nets et directionnels se détachent sur un fond de papier chaud et plat, créant une esthétique académique intemporelle.
description_en: This style replicates the meticulous precision of 19th-century steel engravings and scientific illustrations. It relies entirely on monochromatic fine-line hatching and cross-hatching to build volume, texture, and shadow, completely devoid of smooth gradients. The crisp, directional ink strokes sit against a warm, flat paper-like background, creating a timeless, academic aesthetic.
description_fr: Ce style reproduit la précision méticuleuse des gravures sur acier et des illustrations scientifiques du XIXe siècle. Il repose entièrement sur des hachures et hachures croisées monochromes à lignes fines pour construire le volume, la texture et l'ombre, totalement dépourvu de dégradés lisses. Les traits d'encre nets et directionnels se détachent sur un fond de papier chaud et plat, créant une esthétique académique intemporelle.
prompt: Antique steel engraving, fine-line ink etching, 19th-century scientific illustration, monochromatic intaglio printmaking technique. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The artwork is rendered strictly in a high-contrast duotone palette, utilizing deep {{primary_color}} for the intricate ink strokes and a flat {{secondary_color}} for the underlying archival paper tone, with {{accent_color}} applied to intermediate mid-tone hatching densities. Absolutely no smooth gradients, soft blending, or digital shading are permitted; all volumetric lighting, shadows, and tonal values must be meticulously constructed entirely through the proximity, thickness, and intersecting angles of crisp, directional parallel lines. The visual texture is completely defined by this rigorous cross-hatching, stippling, and contour-following linework that mathematically maps the topography of every surface within the scene. Edges of objects are never solid, continuous vector outlines; instead, they are formed organically by the precise, abrupt termination of individual hatched strokes. The atmosphere is static, academic, and timeless, capturing the clinical objectivity of historical naturalist ledgers. Spatial depth is achieved purely through highly controlled line density rather than atmospheric fading. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. steel engraving, intaglio printmaking, fine-line etching, cross-hatching, monochromatic ink, scientific illustration, vintage lithograph, stippling, antique draftsmanship, crisp linework, hatched shading, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: A vast, empty landscape or abstract atmospheric void rendered in an antique steel engraving and fine-line etching style. The environment is constructed entirely of {{primary_color}} cross-hatching and stippling over a {{secondary_color}} base. Gentle rolling hills, distant horizon lines, or subtle geometric spatial planes are defined by varying densities of crisp parallel lines, with {{accent_color}} adding subtle mid-tone depth. No smooth gradients, purely hatched textures creating a static, vintage, academic atmosphere.
background_prompt_removebg: A vast, empty landscape or abstract atmospheric void rendered in an antique steel engraving and fine-line etching style. The environment is constructed entirely of {{primary_color}} cross-hatching and stippling over a {{secondary_color}} base. In the foreground, an ornate vintage filigree border and intricate etched corner flourishes frame the empty central space, transitioning seamlessly into a flat {{background_color}} surface.
